blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,819 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
